title: Tom's storage Create style
description: Create Styled Tom's Simple Storage. Reviving this texture pack.
body:
# About This pack revamps [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) to match to [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)'s art style much better.

### 👀[Also comes along with a datapack for recipes and more style!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-simple-storage-recipes)
This texture pack is an update of original one made by End_rage.

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-simple-storage

I've used it for a long time and have always liked it; I didn't want to let it go to waste, and the author hasn't shown any changes in a long time. I don't know what's become of him or the project, but I'm sharing it here for those who; like me, enjoy this pack.


> **_NOTE:_** End_rage, if you find this pack, please know that I'm not stealing your work. I'm sharing it for the community because it's been abandoned. If you have any problem with this version being available, I can remove it whenever you say.
With those clarifications out of the way... here's the updated version for 1.21.1!

Everything remains the same as before; you can read the changes in the changelog. But I can show you a sample of the changes I made myself. I hope you like them.

![crafting and storage terminals screen animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8b2c7c5ae38dbcb01f044ce398680e01c4df864.gif)
I had the idea that _"the texture pack already has controls for the terminals... So why not make them 3D like the controls in Create Mod?"_ **And here they are!**
optional of course | chose 2.1.1+3D ![terminals controllers 3D on the floor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ba33e9ef1027dad56a1cc304be52bab4a00df26.jpeg) [](https://www.curseforge.com/members/kentapainter/projects)[]()[]()
